params.name: action
params.description: Form action URL for the submitted search request.

params.name: label
params.description: Accessible label settings for the search field.

params.name: text
params.description: Accessible name for the search field.

params.name: placeholder
params.description: Placeholder text shown in the field. Defaults to `Search`.

params.name: attributes
params.description: Additional HTML attributes for the search field.

params.name: text
params.description: Accessible button label fallback when `button.ariaLabel` is not provided.

params.name: ariaLabel
params.description: Accessible name for the icon-only submit button. Defaults to `Search`.

params.name: attributes
params.description: Additional HTML attributes for the submit button.

params.name: classes
params.description: Classes to add to the root form element.

params.name: attributes
params.description: Additional HTML attributes for the root form element.
